title: Yalunka Matthew 1907 (Jalunga)
description: St Matthew's Gospel in Yalunka, published by the British and Foreign Bible Society in 1907. This is the first Gospel in Yalunka. It was revised and completed by H. Bowers of the Church Missionary Society, assisted by two nationals named S.E. March and M.D. Showers.

language.name: Yalunka
language.area: West of Faranah, south toward Sierra Leone border, north to Passaya; Balaki Subprefecture, Senegal-Mali border. Also in Mali, Senegal, Sierra Leone.
